title: Warm up
content: The slide features three images representing Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, each showcasing a distinctive aspect of the respective city portrayed from a car interior perspective.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide introduces the concept of China's evolution, depicting images of taxis and notable Chinese landmarks. It sets the context for a journey through China's development.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: Participants are asked to investigate and research local features, development strategies, and their outcomes to understand the positive impact. The slide outlines a flow from local features to outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide asks participants to match cities with their respective development strategies: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Session 2 Ask & Analyse.
content: Participants engage in critical analysis and comparative insights. City observers select a question from a list, and city experts answer using text examples.

title: Session 3 Promote Your City!
content: Each group acts as City Promotion Ambassadors to create a 2-minute promotional speech. Taxi drivers and city experts fulfill different roles with specific requirements.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide emphasizes unique development strategies in cities: sustainable urban development, tourism and economic growth, and technology and tradition integration.
